sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = current_frame.segmentation
# Find the blue square with black dot (the player) in both frames
def find_player(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b' and n['children']:
            for c in n['children']:
                child_node = [x for x in seg['nodes'] if x['id'] == c][0]
                if child_node['color'] == 'B':
                    return n
    return None
bp = find_player(before)
ap = find_player(after)
print(f"Player before: {bp['boundary'] if bp else 'None'}")
print(f"Player after: {ap['boundary'] if ap else 'None'}")
# Also find goal (blue structure at bottom-right)
def find_goal(seg):
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 10 and n['pixels'] < 30:
            return n
    return None
bg = find_goal(before)
ag = find_goal(after)
print(f"Goal before: {bg['boundary'] if bg else 'None'}")
print(f"Goal after: {ag['boundary'] if ag else 'None'}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
